result.stdout:
Description:
  CLI for executing commands on a container registry's HTTP API.

Usage:
  dredge [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  image     Commands related to container images
  manifest  Commands related to manifests
  referrer  Commands related to referrers
  repo      Commands related to container repositories
  tag       Commands related to container image tags
  settings  Commands related to Dredge settings

commands.payload:
Description:
  CLI for executing commands on a container registry's HTTP API.

Usage:
  dredge [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  image     Commands related to container images
  manifest  Commands related to manifests
  referrer  Commands related to referrers
  repo      Commands related to container repositories
  tag       Commands related to container image tags
  settings  Commands related to Dredge settings

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands related to container images

Usage:
  dredge image [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compare                            Compares two images
  inspect <image>                    Return low-level information on a container image
  os <image>                         Gets OS info about the container image
  save-layers <image> <output-path>  Saves an image's extracted layers to disk
  dockerfile <image>                 Generates a Dockerfile that represents the image

commands.payload:
Description:
  Commands related to container images

Usage:
  dredge image [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  compare                            Compares two images
  inspect <image>                    Return low-level information on a container image
  os <image>                         Gets OS info about the container image
  save-layers <image> <output-path>  Saves an image's extracted layers to disk
  dockerfile <image>                 Generates a Dockerfile that represents the image

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compares two images

Usage:
  dredge image compare [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  layers <base> <target>  Compares two images by layers
  files <base> <target>   Compares two images by their files

commands.payload:
Description:
  Compares two images

Usage:
  dredge image compare [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  layers <base> <target>  Compares two images by layers
  files <base> <target>   Compares two images by their files

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compares two images by their files

Usage:
  dredge image compare files <base> <target> [options]

Arguments:
  <base>    Name of the base container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)
  <target>  Name of the target container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

Options:
  --os <os>                                  Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>                  Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>                              Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  --base-layer-index <base-layer-index>      Non-empty layer index of the base container image to compare with
  --target-layer-index <target-layer-index>  Non-empty layer index of the target container image to compare against
  --output <ExternalTool>                    Output type [default: ExternalTool]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Compares two images by their files

Usage:
  dredge image compare files <base> <target> [options]

Arguments:
  <base>    Name of the base container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)
  <target>  Name of the target container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

Options:
  --os <os>                                  Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>                  Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>                              Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  --base-layer-index <base-layer-index>      Non-empty layer index of the base container image to compare with
  --target-layer-index <target-layer-index>  Non-empty layer index of the target container image to compare against
  --output <ExternalTool>                    Output type [default: ExternalTool]
  -?, -h, --help                             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Compares two images by layers

Usage:
  dredge image compare layers <base> <target> [options]

Arguments:
  <base>    Name of the base container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)
  <target>  Name of the target container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

Options:
  --os <os>                          Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>          Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>                      Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  --output <Inline|Json|SideBySide>  Output format [default: SideBySide]
  --no-color                         Disables dependency on color in comparison results
  --history                          Include layer history as part of the comparison
  --compressed-size                  Show the compressed size of the layer
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

  --output <Inline|Json|SideBySide>  Output format [default: SideBySide]
  --no-color                         Disables dependency on color in comparison results
  --history                          Include layer history as part of the comparison
  --compressed-size                  Show the compressed size of the layer
  -?, -h, --help                     Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Generates a Dockerfile that represents the image

Usage:
  dredge image dockerfile <image> [options]

Arguments:
  <image>  Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)

Options:
  --os <os>                  Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>  Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>              Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  --no-color                 Disables use of syntax color in the output
  --no-format                Disables use of heuristics to format the layer history for better readability
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Saves an image's extracted layers to disk

Usage:
  dredge image save-layers <image> <output-path> [options]

Arguments:
  <image>        Name of the container image (<image>, <image>:<tag>, or <image>@<digest>)
  <output-path>  Path to the output location

Options:
  --os <os>                    Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>    Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>                Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  --no-squash                  Do not squash the image layers
  --layer-index <layer-index>  Index of the image layer to target
  -?, -h, --help               Show help and usage information

commands.payload:

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands related to manifests

Usage:
  dredge manifest [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  get <name>       Queries a manifest
  digest <name>    Queries the digest of a manifest
  resolve <image>  Resolves a manifest to a target platform's fully-qualified image digest

Description:
  Resolves a manifest to a target platform's fully-qualified image digest

  dredge manifest resolve <image> [options]

  --os <os>                  Target OS of image (e.g. "linux", "windows")
  --os-version <os-version>  Target OS version of image (e.g. "10.0.20348.1129")
  --arch <arch>              Target architecture of image (e.g. "amd64", "arm64")
  -?, -h, --help             Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Commands related to Dredge settings

Usage:
  dredge settings [command] [options]

Options:
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  open                Opens the Dredge settings file
  get <name>          Gets the value of the specified setting
  set <name> <value>  Sets the specified setting name to a value
  clear-cache         Deletes the cached files used by Dredge

commands.payload:

  set <name> <value>  Sets the specified setting name to a value
  clear-cache         Deletes the cached files used by Dredge
